questions.title: Variables
questions.question: What happens after: arr = [1, 2, 3]; b = arr ?
options: Both variables reference the same list
A new copy is created for b
questions.explanation: Assignment binds another reference to the same list object.

questions.title: List Repeat
questions.question: What does arr * 3 do for a list?
questions.explanation: The list sequence is repeated; element-wise math is not applied.

questions.title: append vs extend
questions.question: What does arr.append([4, 5]) do?
questions.explanation: append adds exactly one element, even if it is a list.

questions.title: Time Complexity
questions.question: Pick all operations that are typically O(1) average in Python.
questions.explanation: dict/set hash operations and list append are average O(1); insert at front is O(n).

questions.title: Virtual Env
questions.question: Why do we use a virtual environment (.venv)?
options: To avoid version conflicts across projects
questions.explanation: .venv isolates packages per project and helps avoid dependency conflicts.
